worktree_state.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
  "id": "inventory",
  "name": "Inventory Module",
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "status": "stub",
  "description": "Envanter yönetimi - stok takibi, tedarik ve malzeme yönetimi",

  "type": "feature",
  "category": "operations",

  "author": {
    "name": "E-Menum Team",
    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
  },

  "compatibility": {
    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
    "node": ">=20.0.0"
  },

  "dependencies": {
    "modules": ["auth", "organization", "menu"],
    "optional": ["notification", "analytics", "order"]
  },

  "provides": {
    "services": ["IInventoryService", "IStockService"],
    "events": [
      "inventory.stock.updated",
      "inventory.stock.low",
      "inventory.stock.out",
      "inventory.item.received",
      "inventory.waste.recorded"
    ],
    "hooks": [
      "beforeOrderCreate",
      "afterOrderComplete"
    ],
    "permissions": [
      "inventory:read",
      "inventory:update",
      "inventory:adjust",
      "inventory:configure"
    ]
  },

  "tier": {
    "minimum": "professional",
    "features": {
      "professional": ["basic_tracking", "low_stock_alerts"],
      "business": ["basic_tracking", "low_stock_alerts", "suppliers", "purchase_orders", "waste_tracking"],
      "enterprise": ["basic_tracking", "low_stock_alerts", "suppliers", "purchase_orders", "waste_tracking", "cost_analysis", "forecasting"]
    }
  },

  "plannedFeatures": [
    "Stock level tracking",
    "Low stock alerts",
    "Automatic stock deduction on order",
    "Supplier management",
    "Purchase order creation",
    "Stock receiving",
    "Waste tracking",
    "Cost analysis",
    "Inventory valuation",
    "Stock transfer between branches"
  ],

  "estimatedRelease": "Q3 2026"
}
